title: Agent modifying SIR config denies — provider allow cannot lower it
description: An AI agent writes to SIR's own config (.sir/). deny-sir-config-tamper is a native floor (agent disabling sir). file_write IS in the developer-workflow floor set, but the floor only suppresses advisory escalation of a base ALLOW — it cannot rescue a base deny. A policy provider returns allow; an advisory verdict can never lower a native deny. Final: deny. Proves the native deny survives BOTH the workflow floor AND a provider allow.
